title: Grammar and HIR support for attributes and lambdas
body:
## What was done

Extended the **grammar** and **HIR** to support **attributes** and **lambda expressions** end-to-end through parse and HIR lowering shapes.

## Why it mattered

Modern Beskid surface syntax depends on attributes and lambdas; this commit is the Pecan-era proof that the parser/HIR pipeline could absorb them before the compiler submodule handoff.

## Outcome

Last major analysis-foundation language-meta spike before v0.0 cutoff end (`dd75bff`).

source.subject: Add attribute and lambda expression support to grammar and HIR
